items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Rises As Market Takes a Dip: Key Facts
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) ended the recent trading session at $77.07, demonstrating a +1.76% change from the preceding day's closing price, outpacing the S&P 500's daily loss of 0.01%.

items.headline: RBC Cuts Price Target on Albemarle to $166 From $257, Keeps Outperform Rating
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $207.56, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: BofA Securities Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $155 From $225, Maintains Buy Rating
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $207.56, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: Will ALB's Expansion Actions Power Stronger Sales Volumes?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation ALB is strategically executing its projects aimed at boosting its global lithium conversion capacity. Healthy customer demand, capacity expansion and plant productivity improvements are supporting its volumes.

items.headline: Top Stock Picks for Week of July 13, 2026
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation (ALB) is a premier specialty chemicals company with leading positions in attractive end markets globally. It should gain from long-term growth in the battery-grade lithium market and benefit from actions to boost global lithium derivative capacity.

items.headline: Albemarle Stock Loses 25% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation's ALB shares have tumbled 25.5% in the past month. Falling lithium market prices are weighing on the stock amid slowing EV demand in China, an inventory glut, and prospects of increased supply from mine restarts.
